name: Office Stairwell and Wall Telephone
description: A narrow half-flight of stairs ascending to the mezzanine management office, with a black wall-mounted telephone handset on a bracket at the landing — the nerve center of Mackintosh's communication with police and corporate headquarters.
atmosphericDetails: The faint sound of Mackintosh's voice through the office door — controlled, low, the word 'headquarters' audible once
The smell of cigarette smoke from the ashtray on the landing — someone has been up here recently and recently left
The telephone handset still slightly warm from the last call
